message:
fix(conformance): expand Key shim and fix shortcut registration (bd-150s)

- Expand Key object in @mariozechner/pi-tui shim with:
  - Special keys (escape, enter, tab, space, etc.)
  - Single modifier functions (ctrl, shift, alt)
  - Combined modifier functions (ctrlShift, ctrlAlt, etc.)
- Add __pi_key_to_string() to normalize Key objects to string format
- Use __pi_key_to_string in __pi_register_shortcut for proper key ID extraction
- Add 'shortcut' field to shortcut spec for TS oracle compatibility

This fixes the last 2 conformance failures (plan-mode and preset shortcut mismatches),
achieving 100% pass rate for all 60 official pi-mono extensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
